title: Query D1 from Remix
excerpt: description: Query your D1 database from a Remix application. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/d1/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. Query your D1 database from a Remix application. Remix is no longer recommended for new projects. For new applications, use [React Router](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/framework-guides/web-apps/react-router) instead. If you have an existing Remix application, consider [migrating to React Router ↗](https://reactrouter.com/upgrading/remix).
